title: Implement Template Inheritance in a Recipe Website

source.module: Core Django Fundamentals – Templates & Static Content

topicTags: Core Django Fundamentals – Templates & Static Content

content.problemStatement:
In this practice problem, you'll create a base template and child template for a recipe website. 
You'll use Django template tags to define blocks that can be overridden by child templates.

### Task
Update the code to set up template inheritance to get the following webpage when we load the route `/recipes/`


- In `base.html` - you need to update the `` block to load the content block from the child template as and when applicable
- In `recipe_list.html` - you need to add the following
   - Extend the base template
   - Include a block title "Recipe List"
   - Include a block header "Our Favorite Recipes"
   - Content block tags
